headline: Where Will Nike Stock Be in 5 Years?
summary: Over the past five years, the sportswear and sneaker giant's shares have fallen by almost 68%.

headline: Nike’s AI Push Raises Questions On Margins And Dividend Strength
summary: Nike (NYSE:NKE) is expanding its use of AI in day to day operations and has launched an internal AI learning platform for employees. The company’s Executive Vice President and COO recently discussed the challenge of scaling AI, including the risk of “automation illusion” when tools look efficient but do not yet deliver real gains. These comments highlight Nike’s current focus on digital transformation, efficiency and workforce skills alongside its core footwear and apparel business. Nike,...

headline: NKE Stock Slips Below 50-Day SMA: A Warning Sign for Investors?
summary: NIKE faces a tougher turnaround as inventory cleanup, Sportswear weakness and China pressure weigh on sales, margins and investor confidence.
